service.name: Wikidata API
service.description_for_ai: Free, open, collaborative knowledge base. 100M+ items: people, places, organizations, species, chemical compounds, artworks. Structured data behind Wikipedia. SPARQL queries for complex knowledge graph traversal. No API key needed.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search Wikidata entities by label. Find items representing people, places, organizations, concepts.

language.description: Language code: en, ru, de, fr, zh

capabilities.description_for_ai: Run SPARQL query against Wikidata knowledge graph. Powerful for complex linked data queries.

query.description: SPARQL query e.g. SELECT ?item ?itemLabel WHERE {?item wdt:P31 wd:Q6256. SERVICE wikibase:label {bd:serviceParam wikibase:language en}} LIMIT 10

agent_hints.common_properties: P31=instance of, P279=subclass of, P17=country, P18=image, P569=birth date, P570=death date, P21=sex, P106=occupation
agent_hints.wikidata_ids: Q1=Universe, Q5=human, Q6256=country, Q515=city, Q146=cat, Q23=George Washington
agent_hints.label_service: Always add: SERVICE wikibase:label {bd:serviceParam wikibase:language en.} to get human-readable labels
